description: Custom styled 404 page that matches the brand aesthetic with helpful navigation options

userStories.title: Custom 404 Page Layout
userStories.description: Create a visually appealing 404 page at src/app/not-found.tsx with brand gradient styling, a large '404' heading, friendly message, and centered layout matching the site aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays '404' prominently with brand gradient text
Includes a friendly message like 'Page not found'
Uses consistent styling with rest of site

userStories.title: Navigation Options on 404
userStories.description: Add a 'Go Home' button and optional suggested links to help users navigate back to valid pages
acceptanceCriteria: Button uses existing Button component styling
Optional: links to popular pages like /contact or /exclusive
